prs_created.description: test: add tests for sys, html and time stdlib modules (TestSys.fs, TestHtml.fs, TestTime.fs)
ci: add NuGet and uv dependency caching to build-and-test workflow

merged_prs.description: fix(math): fix factorial signature and add missing constants/functions
fix(math): correct type signatures for copysign, fmod and curried bindings
ci: fix Python version from 3.10 to 3.12 (by dbrattli)
feat(math): add missing math functions (log/base, modf, frexp, ldexp, remainder, isclose, nextafter, ulp, exp2, cbrt)

notes: 10 unlabelled issues blocked by integrity policy (issues #134, #131, #117, #115, #65, #48, #36, #22, #15, #5). Two new Repo Assist PRs pending review: tests for sys/html/time stdlib modules, and CI dependency caching. Future candidates: functools, collections, datetime stdlib bindings.
